changes.value:
## What

Move filter evaluation from client-side JS (`new Function()`) to server-side Rust using the filter-expr crate. When the frontend requests entities for a perspective that has a filter, the backend applies the filter before returning results.

### Design
The evaluator needs a `FilterContext` that maps DSL atoms to entity data:
- `#tag-name` → check entity's `tags` field (array) contains the tag name. Also check `virtual_tags` (READY, BLOCKED, BLOCKING).
- `@user-name` → check entity's `assignees` field matches
- `^card-ref` → check entity's `depends_on` or `id` field matches

### Files to modify
- `swissarmyhammer-filter-expr/src/eval.rs` — add `EntityFilterAdapter` that implements `FilterContext` for an `Entity`
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/perspective_commands.rs` or a new command — apply filter when listing entities for a perspective
- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/perspective-eval.ts` — remove `compileFilter`/`evaluateFilter`/`permissiveProxy` (the JS eval path)
- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/perspective-container.tsx` — update to use pre-filtered entities from backend

### Key decision
How does the backend know which perspective is active? Options:
1. Add a `perspective_id` param to the entity list command
2. Create a new `perspective.entities` command that returns filtered+sorted entities
3. Have the frontend send the filter expression with each entity list request

Recommend option 2 — cleanest separation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Backend correctly filters entities by tag membership (`#bug` matches entities with "bug" in tags)
- [ ] Backend correctly filters by assignee (`@will` matches entities assigned to "will")
- [ ] Backend correctly filters by ref (`^CARD-ID` matches entities with that dependency)
- [ ] Virtual tags work in filters (`#READY`, `#BLOCKED`)
- [ ] Boolean logic (AND, OR, NOT, grouping) works correctly
- [ ] Client-side `new Function()` eval code is removed
- [ ] Performance: filtering 10k entities completes in <10ms

## Tests
- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-filter-expr/src/eval.rs` — entity adapter tests with real Entity structs
- [ ] Integration test: create entities with tags, apply filter, verify correct subset returned
- [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-filter-expr` and `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` pass

## Workflow
- Use `/tdd` — write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
FILTER-2: Server-side filter evaluation in entity listing

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,40 +1,34 @@
 ## What

-Move filter evaluation from client-side JS (`new Function()`) to server-side Rust using the filter-expr crate. When the frontend requests entities for a perspective that has a filter, the backend applies the filter before returning results.
-
-### Design
-The evaluator needs a `FilterContext` that maps DSL atoms to entity data:
-- `#tag-name` → check entity's `tags` field (array) contains the tag name. Also check `virtual_tags` (READY, BLOCKED, BLOCKING).
-- `@user-name` → check entity's `assignees` field matches
-- `^card-ref` → check entity's `depends_on` or `id` field matches
+Add an optional `filter` param to the `list_entities` Tauri command. When present, parse the DSL expression and evaluate it server-side against each entity before returning results. The frontend passes the active perspective's filter string.

 ### Files to modify
-- `swissarmyhammer-filter-expr/src/eval.rs` — add `EntityFilterAdapter` that implements `FilterContext` for an `Entity`
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/perspective_commands.rs` or a new command — apply filter when listing entities for a perspective
-- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/perspective-eval.ts` — remove `compileFilter`/`evaluateFilter`/`permissiveProxy` (the JS eval path)
-- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/perspective-container.tsx` — update to use pre-filtered entities from backend
+- `kanban-app/src/commands.rs` — `list_entities()`: add `filter: Option<String>` param. When `Some`, parse via `filter_expr::parse()`, then evaluate against each entity, returning only matches.
+- `swissarmyhammer-filter-expr/src/eval.rs` — add `EntityFilterAdapter` that maps DSL atoms to entity fields:
+  - `#tag-name` → entity `tags` field (array) contains tag. Also checks `virtual_tags`.
+  - `@user-name` → entity `assignees` field matches
+  - `^card-ref` → entity `depends_on` contains ref, or entity `id` matches
+- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/entity-store-context.tsx` (or wherever `list_entities` is called) — pass filter string from active perspective
+- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/perspective-eval.ts` — remove `compileFilter`, `evaluateFilter`, `clearFilterCache`, `permissiveProxy`, `FilterFn`, `filterCache`. Keep sort functions.
+- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/perspective-container.tsx` — remove client-side `applyFilter`, rely on backend-filtered results

-### Key decision
-How does the backend know which perspective is active? Options:
-1. Add a `perspective_id` param to the entity list command
-2. Create a new `perspective.entities` command that returns filtered+sorted entities
-3. Have the frontend send the filter expression with each entity list request
-
-Recommend option 2 — cleanest separation.
+### Error handling
+- If the filter param fails to parse, return an error (the UI already validated on save, so this is a defensive check)
+- Empty string filter treated as no filter

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] Backend correctly filters entities by tag membership (`#bug` matches entities with "bug" in tags)
-- [ ] Backend correctly filters by assignee (`@will` matches entities assigned to "will")
-- [ ] Backend correctly filters by ref (`^CARD-ID` matches entities with that dependency)
-- [ ] Virtual tags work in filters (`#READY`, `#BLOCKED`)
-- [ ] Boolean logic (AND, OR, NOT, grouping) works correctly
+- [ ] `list_entities("task", filter: Some("#bug"))` returns only entities tagged "bug"
+- [ ] `list_entities("task", filter: Some("#READY"))` matches virtual tags
+- [ ] `list_entities("task", filter: Some("#bug && @will"))` applies boolean logic
+- [ ] `list_entities("task", filter: None)` returns all entities (unchanged behavior)
 - [ ] Client-side `new Function()` eval code is removed
-- [ ] Performance: filtering 10k entities completes in <10ms
+- [ ] Performance: filtering 10k entities in <10ms

 ## Tests
-- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-filter-expr/src/eval.rs` — entity adapter tests with real Entity structs
-- [ ] Integration test: create entities with tags, apply filter, verify correct subset returned
-- [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-filter-expr` and `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` pass
+- [ ] `swissarmyhammer-filter-expr/src/eval.rs` — entity adapter unit tests with real Entity structs
+- [ ] `kanban-app/src/commands.rs` — integration test: list_entities with filter returns subset
+- [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/perspective-eval.test.ts` — remove filter tests, keep sort tests
+- [ ] `cargo test` and `npm test` pass

 ## Workflow
 - Use `/tdd` — write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
\ No newline at end of file

-  - `#tag-name` → entity `tags` field (array) contains tag. Also checks `virtual_tags`.
-  - `@user-name` → entity `assignees` field matches
-  - `^card-ref` → entity `depends_on` contains ref, or entity `id` matches

-- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/perspective-eval.ts` — remove `compileFilter`, `evaluateFilter`, `clearFilterCache`, `permissiveProxy`, `FilterFn`, `filterCache`. Keep sort functions.
-- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/perspective-container.tsx` — remove client-side `applyFilter`, rely on backend-filtered results

+- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/perspective-container.tsx` — update to use pre-filtered entities from backend

+1. Add a `perspective_id` param to the entity list command

-### Error handling
-- If the filter param fails to parse, return an error (the UI already validated on save, so this is a defensive check)
-- Empty string filter treated as no filter
+Recommend option 2 — cleanest separation.

 ## Acceptance Criteria

-- [ ] `list_entities("task", filter: Some("#READY"))` matches virtual tags
-- [ ] `list_entities("task", filter: Some("#bug && @will"))` applies boolean logic
-- [ ] `list_entities("task", filter: None)` returns all entities (unchanged behavior)
+- [ ] Backend correctly filters entities by tag membership (`#bug` matches entities with "bug" in tags)
+- [ ] Backend correctly filters by assignee (`@will` matches entities assigned to "will")
+- [ ] Backend correctly filters by ref (`^CARD-ID` matches entities with that dependency)
+- [ ] Virtual tags work in filters (`#READY`, `#BLOCKED`)
+- [ ] Boolean logic (AND, OR, NOT, grouping) works correctly
 - [ ] Client-side `new Function()` eval code is removed
-- [ ] Performance: filtering 10k entities in <10ms
+- [ ] Performance: filtering 10k entities completes in <10ms

-- [ ] `kanban-app/src/commands.rs` — integration test: list_entities with filter returns subset
-- [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/perspective-eval.test.ts` — remove filter tests, keep sort tests
-- [ ] `cargo test` and `npm test` pass
